# Foundations of Computational Interaction (FCI)

> An interdisciplinary research program for formally describing, measuring, modeling, and
> predicting human–computer interaction. It is a **research program, not an established
> discipline** — its scientific necessity and empirical advantage remain to be demonstrated.
> Nothing here is a validated result unless a record says so explicitly.

Versions move **independently per layer**; a shared number never implies cross-layer conformance.
Theory 0.5.0 (pre-ratification) · contract schemas 0.2.0 · dataset schema 0.3.0 ·
C reference substrate 0.1.0. Passing the substrate's tests establishes reference-kernel
conformance only — not empirical validation.

- [llms-full.txt](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/foundations-of-computational-interaction/blob/main/llms-full.txt): the project-licensed corpus concatenated into one file

## 01 Knowledge System of Record

Canonical definitions, glossary, relational ontology, contract definitions.

- [A Relational Ontology of Computational Interaction](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/foundations-of-computational-interaction/blob/main/docs/01_Knowledge_System_of_Record/01_Ontology/Current/A_Relational_Ontology_of_Computational_Interaction_v0.3.md)
- [Foundations of Computational Interaction Glossary](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/foundations-of-computational-interaction/blob/main/docs/01_Knowledge_System_of_Record/02_Glossary/Computational_Interaction_Science_Glossary_v0.4.md)
- [Foundations of Computational Interaction](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/foundations-of-computational-interaction/blob/main/docs/01_Knowledge_System_of_Record/03_Encyclopedia/Computational_Interaction_Science_Encyclopedia_Article_Draft_v0.3.md)
- [Fundamental and Foundations of Computational Interaction](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/foundations-of-computational-interaction/blob/main/docs/01_Knowledge_System_of_Record/04_Framework/Fundamental_and_Computational_Interaction_Science_v0.4.md)
- [Foundations of Computational Interaction Contracts](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/foundations-of-computational-interaction/blob/main/docs/01_Knowledge_System_of_Record/05_Specifications/Contracts/Computational_Interaction_Science_Contracts_v1.0.0-structure.1.md)
- [Contract ID Registry](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/foundations-of-computational-interaction/blob/main/docs/01_Knowledge_System_of_Record/05_Specifications/Contracts/Contract_ID_Registry.md)
- [Wikipedia Readiness Review: Foundations of Computational Interaction](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/foundations-of-computational-interaction/blob/main/docs/01_Knowledge_System_of_Record/07_Reviews/Computational_Interaction_Science_Wikipedia_Readiness_Review_v0.2.md)
- [Foundations of Computational Interaction - Canonical Glossary](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/foundations-of-computational-interaction/blob/main/docs/01_Knowledge_System_of_Record/08_Canonical_Registry/Canonical_Glossary.md)
- [Foundations of Computational Interaction - Canonical Ontology](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/foundations-of-computational-interaction/blob/main/docs/01_Knowledge_System_of_Record/08_Canonical_Registry/Canonical_Ontology.md)
- [Consent Governance 0.1.0](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/foundations-of-computational-interaction/blob/main/docs/01_Knowledge_System_of_Record/10_Governance/Consent_Governance.md)
- [Ethics and Power Gates 0.1.0](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/foundations-of-computational-interaction/blob/main/docs/01_Knowledge_System_of_Record/10_Governance/Ethics_and_Power_Gates.md)
- [Participant Data Management Plan 0.1.0](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/foundations-of-computational-interaction/blob/main/docs/01_Knowledge_System_of_Record/10_Governance/Participant_Data_Management_Plan.md)
- [Research Governance Minimum](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/foundations-of-computational-interaction/blob/main/docs/01_Knowledge_System_of_Record/10_Governance/README.md)
- [Knowledge System of Record](https://github.com/zachshallbetter/foundations-of-computational-interaction/blob/main/docs/01_Knowledge_System_of_Record/README.md)

Research papers in logical dependency order.

## Excluded from the full text

Named here rather than inlined, because `LICENSES.md` forbids treating them as
project-licensed even when co-located:

- `docs/03_External_Literature` — third-party literature — excluded from project licensing, retained under original terms
- `docs/04_Reference` — bibliographic records and citation metadata — mixed/third-party, not project-licensed
- `docs/90_Project/Previous_Releases` — bundled historical releases — inherit-original, archived byte-for-byte
- `_archive` — bundled historical releases — inherit-original
